summary: Reject malformed runtime named-set replacement values before cloning them into Customizer state.
specSections: Section 2.7 test-first evidence and milestone gates

decisions.topic: Runtime validation at the parameter-value clone boundary
decisions.decision: Validate every ParameterValue before cloning it: accept strings, booleans, finite numbers, or nonempty dense arrays whose every own indexed value is a finite number; reject all other runtime values before a replacement state can be returned.
decisions.rationale: The production file-import caller decodes stock JSON before dispatch, but reduceParameterState is an independently callable runtime boundary. TypeScript types disappear at runtime, and the prior clone converted sparse holes to own undefined elements while retaining Infinity or NaN unchanged. Central validation in cloneParameterValue protects replace-sets and every other clone caller without duplicating the vector invariant or adding a component ceiling.

testEvidence.criterion: Malformed runtime replacement values cannot enter parameter state
testEvidence.test: Dispatch typed-at-compile-time but malformed runtime replace-sets actions containing a sparse six-component vector, a vector ending in Infinity, or scalar NaN; require each reduction to throw and the original document state to remain empty.

red.outcome: ASSERTION-LEVEL RED: Test Files 1 failed (1); Tests 3 failed | 10 skipped (13). None of the sparse-vector, nonfinite-vector, or nonfinite-scalar actions threw; all three malformed values were accepted by the reducer.

green.outcome: GREEN: Test Files 1 passed (1); Tests 3 passed | 10 skipped (13); Duration 754ms.

questions: Caller trace: the only production replace-sets dispatch is ParameterPanel's ParameterSetExchange callback, whose file path first uses decodeParameterSets; direct reducer invocation nevertheless reproduced the independent runtime-invariant hole.

Baseline: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/application/parameters/customizer-schema.test.ts tests/application/parameters/parameter-state.test.ts tests/application/parameters/parameter-overrides.test.ts tests/application/parameters/parameter-set-codec.test.ts tests/ui/parameters/ParameterPanel.test.tsx produced Test Files 5 passed (5), Tests 49 passed (49), Duration 1.21s.
Widened verification: the same command produced Test Files 5 passed (5), Tests 52 passed (52), Duration 1.20s.
